# claude-code-dna

> Behavioral OS for Claude Code agents — not another awesome-list. Battle-tested
> rules + memory architecture + tooling distilled from 11 deeply-read libraries
> (179 skills + 99 agents + Karpathy anti-patterns + memory research) that shape
> HOW an agent thinks, decides, and remembers.

## What this is

- 8 rule files codifying Karpathy's 4 laws of LLM coding + 15 operating instincts
  (verification gate before "done", TDD reflex, root cause before fix, no
  refactor-while-fixing)
- Memory architecture inspired by mem0 v3 (ADD-only writes), langmem (3 types ×
  2 timings), and Microsoft GraphRAG (community-summary indexing) — designed so
  the agent persists across sessions without bloating each conversation's context
- 4 portable scripts: `memory-health.sh` (audit), `memory-search.sh` (BM25-style
  local retrieval, no vector DB at this scale), `skill-spec-audit.sh` (agentskills.io
  compliance — 168 PASS / 23 WARN / 3 FAIL on 194 community skills), and
  `dna-doctor.sh` (single-command health check — 17 checks in <1s, wired into CI)
- Curated catalog of 194 skills + 99 agents with category, trigger keyword, and
  spec-compliance score

## What this is NOT

- Not a redistribution of upstream skill source code (catalog points at upstream)
- Not a framework or plugin engine (rules are markdown, scripts are bash + awk + python3)
- Not telemetry-emitting (zero phone-home)
- Not tied to Claude Code only (works in Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI — rules are
  model-agnostic markdown)

## Key documents

- [README.md](https://github.com/huangji6693-max/claude-code-dna/blob/main/README.md): English overview + 30-second install
- [README.zh.md](https://github.com/huangji6693-max/claude-code-dna/blob/main/README.zh.md): Chinese mirror
- [docs/PHILOSOPHY.md](https://github.com/huangji6693-max/claude-code-dna/blob/main/docs/PHILOSOPHY.md): three principles + 11-library attribution table
- [docs/COMPARISON.md](https://github.com/huangji6693-max/claude-code-dna/blob/main/docs/COMPARISON.md): honest comparison vs SuperClaude / agent-rules / memory-bank + 4 more, with stacking-layer diagram
- [docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md](https://github.com/huangji6693-max/claude-code-dna/blob/main/docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md): install / memory / audit / behavioral / compatibility fixes with exact-cause / exact-fix pairs
- [examples/verification-gate-demo.md](https://github.com/huangji6693-max/claude-code-dna/blob/main/examples/verification-gate-demo.md): before/after transcript of the verification gate firing on a real regression
- [examples/karpathy-laws-in-action.md](https://github.com/huangji6693-max/claude-code-dna/blob/main/examples/karpathy-laws-in-action.md): 4 before/after refactoring pairs, one per law, with red-flag word lists
- [examples/memory-workflow.md](https://github.com/huangji6693-max/claude-code-dna/blob/main/examples/memory-workflow.md): end-to-end 3-layer memory architecture walkthrough from day 1 through day 60
- [examples/dna-doctor-demo.md](https://github.com/huangji6693-max/claude-code-dna/blob/main/examples/dna-doctor-demo.md): both doctor modes + real failures caught (Chinese leftover, shellcheck regression, README missing reference) + pre-commit recipe
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/huangji6693-max/claude-code-dna/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): rule-proposal bar ("would I miss this if it weren't there?")
- [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/huangji6693-max/claude-code-dna/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release history

## Karpathy's 4 laws (the daily checklist)

1. **Think before coding** — surface assumptions and trade-offs; don't silently pick one interpretation
2. **Simplicity first** — if 200 lines work, rewrite to 50; no abstraction for single-use logic
3. **Surgical changes** — every diff line traces back to the user's request; no refactor-while-fixing
4. **Goal-driven execution** — weak goals = guaranteed failure; convert tasks to verifiable success criteria

## The 11 libraries this draws from

anthropics/skills (official agentskills.io spec) · obra/superpowers (verification + TDD reflexes) ·
forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills (the 4 anti-pattern laws) · mem0ai/mem0 (ADD-only memory) ·
langchain-ai/langmem (3 types × 2 timings) · microsoft/graphrag (community-summary indexing) ·
ruvnet/claude-flow (multi-agent orchestration) · warpdotdev/warp (block-as-object + spec-PR) ·
VectifyAI/PageIndex (vectorless RAG philosophy) · Karpathy public posts on LLM coding patterns ·
private collections (operating instincts).
